what_it_does: Records a detailed visual and structural decomposition of slides 18–34 of a ConceptV/Counterpart investor pitch deck, cataloguing per-slide attention flow and reusable design-system findings with recipes, evidence, emergent flags, and generator rules across geometry, colour, typography, padding, chrome modes, zones, and sequence.
observations: Contains a per-slide 'attention_flow' array describing how the eye moves across each slide.
Findings are grouped into categories such as gradient-shading-opacity, geometry, type-hierarchy, padding-alignment, color-palette, atom, line-connector, texture, chrome-mode, zone, and sequence.
Each finding includes a 'recipe', slide-number 'evidence', an 'emergent' boolean, and a 'generator_rule'.
The appendix is described not as supplementary material but as a second embedded pitch deck restating the thesis (p31–p34).
Defines a strict warm-gold design system with primary gold #b8952a, olive-gold labels, cream/hatched backgrounds, and semantic green/red directional arrows.
Specifies precise layout rules: equal-gutter N-column grids, equal card padding, 32–48px zone gaps, and 5–6% slide margins.
Includes micro-semantic atoms: arrow direction meaning, status-dot colour coding, octagon badges, QR codes, gold star timing signal, and a bottom-right V badge.
Notes a faint architectural ghost texture behind many content slides.
The final 'sequence' finding is truncated mid-sentence.
standouts: Appendix as an embedded second deck with its own cover/problem/solution/innovation arc.
Mathematically rigid equal-gutter N-column grid rule with computed column widths.
Frosted-card overlay as the primary mechanism for text on full-bleed photos.
Hatched-band stat strip as the recurring spine for macro data rows.
Background ghost architectural line-drawing texture at very low opacity.
conventions: Follows a structured JSON schema with category-tagged findings.
Cites empirical evidence as specific slide numbers (p18–p34).
Pairs every pattern with an actionable generator_rule.
Distinguishes 'emergent' patterns from established recurring ones.
Uses neutral, descriptive language without ranking or prescribing beyond the file's own rules.
Some overlap exists between geometry and line-connector categories for the same dashed connector pattern.
The file ends abruptly, breaking completeness of the sequence category.
concerns: Final finding under 'sequence' is truncated mid-sentence, leaving the rule incomplete.
Certain patterns are duplicated across categories (dashed connector appears in both geometry and line-connector).
Measurements are described as precise but appear derived from visual inspection rather than source files.
Rules may overgeneralize from a single deck artifact without cross-deck validation.
No explicit definition of 'emergent' is provided within the file.
notes: A granular, rule-oriented teardown of the back half of a pitch deck that treats slide grammar as a generative design system, but ends abruptly mid-entry.
questions: Who is the intended consumer of these generator rules—human designers, an automated slide builder, or a design-token system?
How were the pixel-level measurements derived: manual inspection, image analysis, or source files?
How does this file relate to part 1/3 and part 3/3 of the same extraction?
Is 'emergent' defined elsewhere in the ledger?
What is the full content of the truncated sequence finding?
Do these rules apply to other Counterpart/ConceptV brand materials beyond this deck?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file acts as an interpretive design-substrate ledger entry that extracts reusable visual grammar from a pitch-deck artifact.
apparent_themes: Visual grammar as generative code/design substrate.
Warm luxury aesthetic anchored by gold, cream, and architectural photography.
Data density controlled through hierarchy, whitespace, and repeated stat-band structures.
Semantic micro-interactions encoded by arrow direction, status dots, and colour overrides.
Appendix as narrative redundancy and alternate entry point.
Minimal chrome and photo-as-tone emotional resets.
intention_signals: To codify the pitch deck's design language into reproducible, machine-readable rules so the deck and related materials can be generated, audited, or extended consistently, while capturing both recurring patterns and one-off emergent inventions.
novelty: Treats the appendix as a second self-contained pitch deck; encodes arrow direction as a semantic signal rather than decoration; combines luxury real-estate photography with rigorous, mathematically stated data-slide grammar; and packages the whole artifact as a generator-rule substrate.
contribution: A slide-indexed inventory of visual patterns, attention-flow maps, colour/token values, grid and padding constraints, and semantic micro-elements for a warm-gold property-tech pitch deck, usable as a reference substrate for reconstructing or auditing ConceptV/Counterpart presentation design.
summary_for_embedding: An interpretive ledger entry that decomposes slides 18–34 of a ConceptV/Counterpart investor pitch deck into per-slide attention flows and categorized design-system findings with recipes, evidence, and generator rules.
intention_for_embedding: To extract and codify the deck's visual grammar into reusable, machine-readable design substrate rules.
